subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-09 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Christ spent most of His time on the shores of Lake Tiberius, but, alas, none of His sacred fragrances have remained.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت مسیح بیشتر اوقات در سواحل بحیره طبریا بودند لکن هیچ از نفحات قدس
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
